form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 400m at Gawler. That followed a win two back in 16.84 beating Nat Nismo over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 20.04, beating Tough Cookie. Last start finished 4th in a TG1-4W on March 31 over 342m at this track behind Master Kilcoy beaten 4.5 lengths (20.36). Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Best figures puts her right in this and well worth another chance.
